prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic wide-angle scene of a fortified desert military communications outpost at golden hour, inspired by a modern tactical video game environment. The camera is low to the ground and slightly Dutch-tilted, looking up a dusty dirt road toward a concrete checkpoint compound with a central watchtower/control building, an open dark garage door, stacked concrete barriers, sand-filled blast walls, chain-link fencing, metal catwalks, pipes, antennas, and a large parabolic satellite dish on the roof to the right. Add exactly 2 visible text markings: a concrete barrier in the lower left reading “G.T.I HAWK” and a vertical banner on the tower reading “G.T.I HAWK” with a simple hawk-like emblem. Surround the base with arid desert details: rocky cliffs on the left, several palm trees, scrub grass, dry weeds, scattered crates and utility boxes, worn road tracks, and tan stone walls framing the foreground. Use warm orange sunset light, dramatic partly cloudy sky, long shadows, dusty atmospheric haze, realistic weathered concrete and metal textures, high dynamic range, sharp environmental detail, no people, no vehicles, no UI, no watermark. Overall mood: tense, abandoned, tactical, sun-baked desert base in Middle Eastern desert.
